mnemonics.title: ACID Properties
mnemonics.content: Atomic Cats Insist on Durability: Atomicity, Consistency, Isolation, Durability

acronyms.usage: Describes systems handling both OLTP and OLAP workloads

visualTips.visualization: Imagine breaking a glass tabletop into pieces that form identical smaller tables when dropped

analogies.analogy: Like a chef keeping all ingredients pre-chopped on countertop instead of fetching from pantry (disk)
